issues.description: useDashboardRuns/useDashboardIssues limit(500) may become insufficient for high-volume companies. Consider pagination or aggregation for chart data.

summary: Ported Paperclip-style dashboard with 4 dedicated Supabase-backed data hooks (runs, issues, agents, activity), all company-scoped with 15s polling. Added intentional empty states for every section (metric cards, charts, agent panel, activity panel). 7 new tests cover all dashboard integration scenarios. Clean separation of concerns between metric hooks and data hooks.
